themes.title: Checkout Performance
themes.description: Enhancing the speed and reliability of the checkout process.

themes.title: User Experience Improvements
themes.description: Improving user interaction and satisfaction during the checkout process.

themes.title: Payment Gateway Migration
themes.description: Transitioning to a new payment gateway to enhance transaction reliability.

milestones.name: MVP Launch
milestones.description: Launch the MVP version with critical features for checkout.
milestones.success_criteria: MVP features are live with a checkout success rate of at least 95%.

milestones.name: V1 Launch
milestones.description: Launch V1 with additional user experience improvements and coupon features.
milestones.success_criteria: V1 features are live with user satisfaction rating of at least 80%.

milestones.name: V2 Launch
milestones.description: Launch V2 with enhanced coupon management features.
milestones.success_criteria: V2 features are live with a 20% increase in coupon usage.

sequencing.reason: V1 features depend on the successful launch of MVP.
V2 features depend on the successful launch of V1.

mvp.goal: Deliver core checkout functionalities with high reliability.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience and introduce coupon features.
